item.name: Sidereal Whale
item.description:
Legend has it that this ethereal whale of limne 3-β was born from the yawning maw of a great dragon.

[Suitable for printing on extra large canvases.]

fish.guide: Recent theories on the subject of this cosmic wavekin suggest it to be the inspiration for the lunar whale─the starfaring airship of Mysidian myth.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - The Sea of Stars
